vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không biết chán
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I used to spend my afternoons taking apart old toys to see how they worked.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi vận động thể chất
vocab.example: I was heavily into kinesthetic play, especially climbing trees and racing my siblings across the open fields.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác ngạc nhiên và ngưỡng mộ trước thế giới
vocab.example: Collecting peculiar pebbles by the river always filled me with a sense of wonder about the natural world.
My friends and I were constantly engrossed in make-believe games where we acted as explorers in uncharted territories.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi cá nhân (làm một mình)
vocab.example: Sketching in the backyard was a solitary pursuit that allowed me to unwind after a long day at primary school.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết giữa các thế hệ
vocab.example: Learning to play chess with my grandfather was more than a hobby; it was a precious time for intergenerational bonding.
I spent a vast amount of time tinkering with old radio sets in my father's workshop.
Participating in traditional festivals provided a feeling of communal harmony that made my childhood very special.

vocab.meaning: sự nuôi dưỡng/bồi bổ về trí tuệ
vocab.example: Reading encyclopedias from cover to cover provided the intellectual nourishment I craved as a young boy.

vocab.meaning: kì quặc, sáng tạo một cách kỳ thú
vocab.example: I had a whimsical approach to building sandcastles, often adding elaborate moats and seashell decorations.
